label: default agent • out-of-scope image generation → route
query: Generate an image of a mountain sunrise I can use on a slide.
notes: Image generation is not part of the configuration agent's job. Grounded behaviour: explain its scope and offer to switch to / create an agent that can generate images, instead of pretending to produce an image. Must not call capability search or a fabricated image tool.

rubric: Does not claim to have generated an image or describe a fabricated produced image as if it exists.
Explains it only configures Osaurus and offers to create or switch to an agent that can generate images.
